reviews.review_text: I put up a tent on a powered site. Great having the kitchen with fridge, great stove, microwave, barbecue and dual sinks. Toilets/showers are well maintained as well as the grounds.

Had an amazing stay here! Kali, my cat seemed to enjoy it quite a lot too, once she finally settled that is 😋 I appreciate the consideration in allowing me to have her stay here with me! 5 star treatment at a 5 star establishment! If I'm ever needing to stay in Kingscliff again, will most definitely be here! Thanks guys 🙂

Located about 3-4 klms from Tweed City. Constant traffic noise from M1 freeway right into early hours of morning AM and many flights over head from Coolangatta airport starting at 6am. Grassed areas for van parking are about 50% grass and are bare earth where vans are parked. Suggest concrete slab is better! These could be better maintained with actual grass like stated and paid for! Bathroom facilities need an upgrade. Overall ok for $40 pn but park could do a lot better. Staff were very pleasant.

What a great little park! Amenities were super clean, caravan sites were good size. Pool, lots of kids playing together, short walk to beach and cafe. And the reception was the friendliest I’ve ever met! Thanks for a great stay! We’ll be back!

Great little spot.... Traffic noise from the highway is a little bit of a bugger, but don't let that deter you from staying.

Great walk into Kingscliff and surrounds. Friendly getting on arrival. Will be back

Awesome place. Awesome people
Lovely amenities.
Nice pool
Close to bus and shops
Highly recommend
I didn't stay here but was there to visit someone. I would stay there. I normally try to avoid parks with so many permanent residents but it seems to be retirees here. Staff are super friendly.

We were visiting friends and I contacted the staff members as I wanted to bring our fur babies along. They were so responsive and accommodating. I received quick and very detailed response.

There were no issues bringing our fur babies. We were even given a swipe card for the boom gate although we were only visiting for the day. We returned the card in the key box.

Amazing staff and great location!  We had a great time! 🙂

Thank you.
Getting very run down. Had to pay $10per dog per night

Lovely quiet little park for holiday season.
Very neat and tidy park and looks like it provided a pizza van on Thursday nights.
The pool area looked amazing

My son and I were in the area for family reasons and our stay at Ingenia Kingscliff was brief.

However, the service we received was of the very highest order and in particular from Edie who treated us like long term residents. I cannot speak highly enough of her

The ensuite site we had was almost impossible to fit our caravan on. With my van tyres right on the edge of the slab there was less than 20cm between my van and a tree on the other side. The sites in this area of the park are ridiculously small with barely room to park your car. The reception staff were completely disinterested in my concerns.
Fabulous holiday park, clean and well maintained. We hired one of the cabins and really enjoyed our 3 night stay. Will definitely be returning 😊
Very neat and tidy park. Amenities kept clean.  Nice pool.
Eadie the receptionist received us and was absolutely lovely. Very professional and helpful. Would highly recommend again

What a great place to stay. The staff were very helpful and friendly. A specialention to Jess for checking me in. Nothing seemed a problem for her. Quiet place to stay with lovely friendly guests staying too. Being pet friendly isbthe cherry on top.
Stayed at a site in a van, great service, good location and really good water pressure. Amenities where clean too.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Ingenia Holiday Park Kingscliff – Absolutely Outstanding!

Had an amazing stay at Ingenia Holiday Park Kingscliff. The entire team is incredibly positive, passionate and genuinely committed to making your stay unforgettable. Their friendliness creates such a welcoming vibe from the moment you arrive.

The atmosphere is fantastic for families — including our four-legged family members. It’s refreshing to find a place that truly embraces being pet-friendly without compromising comfort or cleanliness.

The amenities are top-notch: spotless facilities, plenty of space, and everything you need for a relaxing break. The added touches like the coffee van in the morning and the food trucks in the evening really make the experience feel special. It makes those holiday moments easy, fun and memorable.

Highly recommend to anyone looking for a relaxed, family-oriented getaway. We’ll definitely be back!

Spent 2 nights at this amazing location. The house was nice and clean, you will find everything you need in the room. Only disadvantage is the noise from the airplanes, but I got used to it. Good job, Ingenia, keep it up!

Spent 5 days in the bungalow i had a wonderful experience staff amenities and location was perfect.
Would definitely recommend the park and was sad to say goodbye.

Cool place to stay for a long weekend, handy to have everything.
Has everything you need, staff really friendly - awesome to stay if you have dogs.
We stayed for 3 nights to celebrate a birthday, thoroughly enjoyed the atmosphere and the staff were very welcoming and friendly.
A wonderful visit with our caravan. Beautiful views and sunsets over the water.
Had a great holiday here. Kids loved the pool.

We had the best time here at Ingenia!
The room was comfortable.
Thank you Mokao for everything 🥰
You are fabulous 😍
Hope to come back & stay again 🌊

$89 overnight for campervan on powered site with ensuite. The facilities and site are reasonably good, but greatly annoyed by dishonest marketing. This place is NOT Kingscliff, it's Chinderah ... right under airport flight path. Worse, this particular park is bordered by highway and main roads unlike another cheaper Chinderah park by where you only put up with aircraft noise. So Ingenia is incredibly noisy and I would never have booked in if not mislead by the name. One star for a dishonest, misleading, practice.
Top je recommande !

One of the best parks I've ever stayed in.  Seamless check-in with lovely friendly reception staff who were very accommodating allowing me to have a late check out.  We had booked the family studio which is a super cute cottage divided into 3 separate units.  The room had a queen bed and a single bed which were plush and comfortable. Small kitchenette with electric jug, toaster, electric frypan and electric plug in hotplate.  All the usual suspects in respect to crockery and cutlery with some saucepans for the hotplate.  Small table and chairs for two. The water pressure is biblical and was welcome after hours travelling in the car. Toiletries are of a nice quality, animal cruelty free and weird chemical free.  The whole place was spotlessly clean.  The air con was whisper quiet and very efficient.  The park itself has a nice family vibe.  The tiny little bit of feedback I would give would be blockout curtains on the window (they're on the door but not the window) .  Unfortunately the roller blind let's the pesky sun in a bit early for my liking.  But otherwise faultless.  Will definitely be back
Staff were friendly, the sites were nice and dog friendly. Good amenities.
We were very happy with our slab site ensuite very clean everything worked good hot shower quiet park good sized site.  Definitely will stay again.
Great 😃

We stayed in a studio cabin ( No 1)  for 6 nights, it was the most uncomfortable stay we have experienced, and we travel alot. The bed was so soft and i suspect old as we both kept rolling into the middle, the bottom sheet was not fitted and to small for the bed so everytime you rolled the sheet bunched up under you. The cabins are noisy and we could hear the people behind us banging and clanging and walking around.  The 3rd single bed is a waste of space and should be replaced with a small sofa so you can at least sit down to watch the TV or relax to read a book etc, instead you have to sit on a very uncomfortable wooden kitchen chair. And last but certainly not least the bathroom is so old I feel it is the original one from when they probably opened the park, the sink hole was broken with no grate and the screw on plug was missing so having a shave for my husband was impossible. The tiles are all cracked along the bottom harbouring goodness knows what germs, the cabinet is to low over the sink and almost impossible to brush your teeth without hitting your head, and the sink is tiny.
All in all a very overpriced uncomfortable stay, maybe good for just a one night stay.
Would not recommend for anything more than that.
We  were  on a bus 🚌  trip  and it was excellent

Spent 5 nights - facilities clean, staff very friendly! Being a little out of town proved to be not an issue.  Live music with
Nick Mackey Sat arvo was very enjoyable & the pizza & coffee van was a bonus!
Overall a very good experience!!
Thank you Ingenia Kingscliff!
Friendly staff, great for us travelling with our dog. We had an ensuite site, ensuite was very clean. Great coffee van on site.
A great family place with awesome facilities very respected and tidy place!

allocated a small site for a larger caravan, with our van actually extending onto the roadway (we should have been allocated a larger site, noting we advised van size at the time of the booking) Overall though the value was good ($40 per night) and the toilet blocks were clean and well maintained.
Site was good, easy access powered and water, good amenities, and very peaceful area.
Amenities are spot on. Check in a breeze with a lovely host. Good size sites. Caravan, annexe and car all side by side with room to spare. We have a 20ft van.

Had a great stay. Not sure what the lower google reviews are talking about. We stay in many parks and the ammenities are fantastic, clean and well maintained. Customer service was good and walking distance to dog beach, tavern and river.

Excellent price for school holiday time, service was wonderful. Cabin was clean and dog friendly, beds were super comfortable. Location was great.. they have a coffee van on site with excellent coffee and food!
Nice park,Quite, amenities clean. Would recommend and we will come visit again.

Older caravan park in need of amenities upgrade.
Staff friendly and helpful.
Very clean and staff brilliant

The park is great, Rachel and her team a welcoming, friendly and really helpful,  the park is very clean the amenities are clean all the time AND a big sign on the door letting everyone know a make is happening, 3x washing machines taking not $1 & $2 coins
The residents are also really friendly and welcoming, up for a chat on their walks, even gave me cuttings to take home(thanks glen)
Easy walk to the beach and river and a short drive to the boarder
Thanks for helping us make happy memories
Vicki & John londonderry

Great looking caravan park.
I fit brake control units Anderson plugs.
Glenn Rowe Auto electrician.

The park was clean and the staff were friendly the slab sites are not very flat lots of cracks and ours had a huge palm tree right in front making it a challenge to park. It's also pretty close to the major highway so can be a little noisy at times.

Good holiday Park to use as a base, although shower blocks are a little dated (renovations coming soon, a sign said.)
They were very clean grounds kept very tidy and manicured.
As well as reasonable priced.
I'd come back again.
No es el lugar más limpio, especialmente en los baños
Second stay now and booked in for later in the year.👍😁
Lovely spot 👌 quiet, clean and easy 10mint walk to beach 🏖️

Great caravan park lovely helpful staff
Loved our site #42
Clean amenities
The best pool ever

We were very happy with our brief stay at Ingenia, Kingscliff.
The standout for us was definitely the staff, in particular, Rachel, who was extremely helpful and a pleasure to deal with.
Our room was quite well appointed; with all the essentials, including tea, coffee, and fresh milk, which was a nice extra.
Great location for all the tourist attractions, yet also within easy distance off the highway; traffic noise wasn't a problem at all.  We found it a very quiet location, with a well-maintained pool, and play area for children.  Overall, we had a great stay.
Thank you!
Wir hatten einen kleinen Bungalow gemietet, es war alles da, was man braucht.
Love this place, we go every year xx

Not a bad park office staff very friendly. Unfortunately our grass site was unmowed grass up to my knees, amenities are dated and not cleaned in the 4 days we were there. Lack of garbage bins also only recycling bins no general waste bins. Good that it is dog friendly.

Overpriced park for the location, quality of amenities and facilities. It was ok as a last minute booking on a sold out weekend. So we were happy to have somewhere to stay, that was also pet friendly. However, it would never be our first choice of parks in the area. Rundown toilet and shower facilities. Pool surface is coming off, leaving large patches with sharp edges.

Booking process was easy. The staff were very friendly. Communication before and during the stay was good.

With a bit of maintenance and a facelift, the cost would be more justified. I just can't get past the price when compared to what other places offer in comparison. We will plan ahead next time and find another place.

We booked a last minute stay for the Australia Day long weekend and the team were lovely to deal with securing us a spot.

We booked a powered camp site where we set up a gazebo and swags and as we arrived late the checkin was easy with a text message sent on how to access the key from a lock box and a map to find our site.

Our site was located right close to the toilets, bbq area, pool and playground and the laundry and shower block was a short walk away.

As there are a lot of permanents living in the park it was very quiet and had everything you need to make camping a breeze.

It was situated in a great location just off the M1, a short walk to the river and less than 5min drive to the Main Street of Kingscliff.

We absolutely loved it and will be back again.
This was a great choice of places to staff in Tweed Head. We will be back. Close to beaches, cafes and pub not far away.

Was the  best place we have ever stayed at. Lovely clean park. Very quiet. They have different vans with different foods come in the park. A coffee and breakfast van out the front each morning. All in all i highly recommend the park.

Decided to book a last minute getaway for a couple of nights. They had one cabin available because someone checked out early (now I think I know why!). Upon check-in all we got was key handed to me and directions to cabin. No other information about the park or even a welcome. Cabin was nothing like it looked on website, no verandah, just a dirty table and couple of chairs dumped in front of the steps surrounded by weeds and unmowed lawn. Curtains inside were full of holes! It's also no where near anything! Too far to walk to the river in the heat and a long way from the beautiful Kingscliffe strip! Decided not to stay and whilst I knew we'd done our money, when I told reception that we've decided not to stay all she said was "oh ok" never even asked why or for some feedback, just took the key off me. The look on her face pretty much said it all, not another one!

Thank you to Rachael. We stayed 2 nights and the studio cabins and it was very well maintained. Facilities were great, close to some great eateries. Will definately be back again. Good family friendly park.

Had to cancel our booking seven months ahead of our trip. Hidden in the terms and conditions was a “non-refundable” deposit which happened to be the full amount. Had to cancel due to change of circumstances and no refund - will never use Ingenia parks again. Can understand losing deposit with late notice but seven months out? Give me a break. Take care when booking!
Great!
Rachael was very helpful and made my stay easy. Clean facilities and well maintained area.
Great cabin, modern and clean. Great facilities, great air cond and TV and fridge. Great pool. Great location.
I loved this place, it's managed very well. I'll be back again..
Very small sites but very friendly staff and clean facilities. Waterpark for kiddies. Wifi free but not working. Some shade with very nice tries. A lot of birds and bats.
Excellent large caravan site, clean and modern ensuite and loads of activities for the grand kids

Just spent a relaxed week at this friendly,  secure park. Staff are helpful and responsive.  While there are a lot of permanent residents, we found them to be friendly and happy for a chat. Powered sites are large enough for van, annexe and car. Doggies have to be leashed as at all parks, but they got lots of pats and attention from friendly locals and visitors alike. Will be back!!
Studio was dated, tired and not very clean suggest changing or cleaning curtains, floors were filthy

The camping site is truly perfect, but I want to highlight the excellent customer service. They resolved my booking mistake without charging me any extra fees. It was a fantastic experience! Highly recommended!
Not the worst park we've stayed in but with a little more effort it could be.

Bright, airy cabin that we shared with a small dog. The room was spacious, the bed comfortable and kitchenette had all we required.
Few areas could benifit from a update, but overall very comfortable.

Just terrible, we stayed in one of the hexagonal studios. These actually comprise 3 separate units.|Walls are paper thin, so you here everything going on next door.|Our unit was filthy, windows covered in grime, kitchen utensils and jug disgusting.|Floor was dirty. The whole place is tired and run down. Stay away, God knows what Ingenia Retirement villages are like., this joint is not a good example.
Great place to stay, and dog friendly! Nice cabins.

Staff were lovely, and it is a great location. I would recommend updating your photos of the cabins. What was advertised V what we got was quite different. The bunks were more so toddler size compared to what looked like full size in the advertisement so my 13yold had to sleep on the hard lounge. I would have opted for 2 double beds if we had of known.
Very friendly and helpful reception staff. Booked a powered site and a cabin, both need some tlc. Would be great if the WiFi was actually satisfactory. Like the location.

Room was run down broken door handles and door frames and dirty. Also felt like I was being bitten by something in the bed so I left without staying my second night. Do not recommend, I will not stay here again. Way overpriced

Great location for us to bike ride along the coast and visit family & friends for 3 days. Basic cabin was good value and worked well for us. Only improvement would be to include a top sheet in addition to a doona to improve comfort & hygiene.
We had a great time in kingscliff staying at this caravan park! Staff were lovely and park and facilities were clean!! Would recommend.
After a bad start we were allocated a better cabin. Management listened & the 2nd cabin was much better.
Nice & clean & peaceful. Lots of permanents.
We got a ensuite power site they were nice and clean

Nice enough park but more permanent dwellings than travelers so feel intruding.
Amenities great and many of them,  great camp kitchen, games room and pool.
Not a lot surrounding park to do although short walk to river.
Ok for short stop  or if have lots to do in the area.

Ensuite smelt due to a broken vent pipe; ramp to ensuite was steep and therefore slippery in the rain; water from rain kept coming in under the door and the concrete slab was badly cracked and disjointed and was a trip hazard. The position is next to a major road and so it was noisy all night. A very disappointing stay and would not recommend it unless improvements have been made.

I had a comfortable stay & the activity rooms were ok. But the park had no pool table or table tennis or anything indoor activity & it did rain for the whole 7 days staying here.lucky I had my mates caravan

We stayed here for almost a week whilst moving house.
The park was quiet and set in a great location and offered great facilities.
The admin staff behind the desk helped us out in a time of need and my wife Carol and I would like to than them very uch

The cabins were ok, just not clean, cabin 18 in particular was very dirty. We were only booked in for 3 cabins overnight during a road trip. If we had a longer stay we would have changed to other accomodation.we spoke to staff and they seemed to be not interested

This park has a lot of permanent full time residents, like the vast majority.

Unfortunate for us, the permanent beside us feels they are more important than everyone else, first parking, the setting up an extra tent in our site.

We were left with nowhere to park and the person on the other side giving us a rev up about being too far over.

So had to park in the road.

Unfortunate that we spoke about it with reception, who noted she had seen it the day prior, but did nothing about it......

Facilities ok, but dates, one toilet not working and taped off.

Everyone needs permanents, but it's unfortunate when they take take over and make you feel uncomfortable

Check in was quick and friendly. |Unfortunately my cabin number 18,|was absolutely filthy. The lounge was so bad I had to put a towel on it just so I could sit. Not to mention the smell from the lounge. Everything was so dusty you could smell the dust. I would not recommend staying here.

This is our second stay here and unfortunately this time round was not great, first up we had to borrow a broom and clean slab , as it was covered in dried lumps  of red clay, receptionist acknowledged it was there and apologised but puzzled if that was the case why wasn't it cleaned before we arrived.
Then our toilet block had no soap for the 3 days there and the cleaning has a lot to be desired , luckily I'd finished shower when they came in as there was no warning a male was coming in with her, watched cleaning as I finished up , nothing got swept or washed down , hence the cobwebs and what looked like wet toilet paper on walls being there whole time .
The park itself and residents are great unfortunately the cleaners let it down this weekend , and feel the up keep of toilet blocks have not been maintained to the standard of other Ingenia parks we've stayed in.

Location, Immaculate room, Great Admin.
Couldn't ask for more, thank you so much for a wonderfully restful night.
Oh, and The Cowdies won 🤔😁.

Friendly staff
Good location

Came down from Brisbane to stay with a friend for a night very disappointed when I arrived.  My friend had complained about the state of the room when she arrived but nothing was done about it.  On the patio was an ash tray that had not been emptied or cleaned from the last person who had stay in the room disgusting.  Bathroom was old and dirty could not hang towels on the towel rack without the hairdryer falling off. Only power points available to be use successfully was behind microwave two more point were found but inaccessible.  Then I notice the sheets that my friend had been sleeping in had mould on them.  Then in the morning I found a cockroach run around.  I would rate this park at a negative 10 do not stay here
I would never come again and would never recommend this stay to anybody. Cabin not clean, wifi non existing, no smart tv. I felt like I was back in the dark ages. Just awful.
Amenities are old and not cleaned often. Drop Point was chocked, and every time you call the reception, they said that the plumber would be coming to fix it, but no one came

My children and I thoroughly enjoyed our stay at this park! We had a small issue regarding our cabin upon arrival but after speaking to the manager about this, she quickly resolved it for us in a very friendly and efficient manner.  The park is close to the beach and shops, the pool was amazing and the grounds and amenities are clean and well maintained. Best of all the park is peaceful and quiet at night! We had a wonderful holiday at Ingenia Kingscliff. Thanks again to the wonderful manager and staff.  🙂

A very expensive park with nothing for the kids. We paid $130/night for a family of 5. The pool was lovely. But there was no green space for kids to play. Everything they tried to do (ride bikes, kick a soccer ball, chase lizards) met with cranky permanent residents who clearly don't want to share their space. Amenities were old and not cleaned very well. 50 odd sites means they could be making roughly $5k a night. None of that money is going back into the park.

I used to camp here for many years in a tent had great memories. Will never be back here again booked a cabin as I have medical issues need to be in aircon 67 years old with my son who is my carer 43 years old paid round about figure of $1700 for 10 days
They told me there was a queen bed and bunk bed my son could sleep on bottom well bunk beds were cot size with a sign saying no children over 9 years not to sleep on them . My son had to sleep on the floor all the time we were there . I was ready to leave after the first day . the aircon did not work approached them an asked to be moved and was told they can’t do that it took 4 days to get someone out to find him only cleaning the aircon said it’s fixed No it was not still no aircon . Was so very disappointed in in staff they never went out of there way to help you .oh they did lend an air cooler but that was as high as my sons knees if you did not have it direct in front of you you could not feel it . I know people down there on holidays that also said they won’t be back .
Very disappointed
Shannon Wellby

We stayed here for 2 nights with our daughter and son in law.
Check in was a breeze.
Sites were spacious and well maintained. Facilities at this park were a little dated, but always clean and tidy.
Pool area was fantastic and camp kitchen facilities were clean and ample for those who needed them.
Would definately stay here again.

highly recommend,
safe clean and well managed

It was a lovely stay!
Very quiet and relaxing.
The bed and mattress we slept on was sublime.
Never slept better.
Met large bearded dragon lizard out the front of our cabin
A great location and helpful and friendly staff.
Janette and Greg (Sydney)

Lovely place , close to Chinedrah Tavern and takeaway shop including Chinese food.
Amenities were very clean and tidy was happy to use communal bathroom.
Bbq and playground facilities were available and if the weather was kind to us we would have utilised this.
what a good place to stay on a public holiday with plenty of sites to stay at as well allowing dogs to stay there
We paid $69 a night for just a small swag! Be prepared for big $$.

5/5 for our getaway!!!||The welcome from Reception and other staff is so refreshing! We were taken aback with the customer service, attention to detail and friendly demeanour.  The additional information of site seeing, events and local recommendations of restaurants, pubs and restaurants was on point!  The icing on the cake, perfectly located to travel north or south with public transport 15-30 minutes of the hour.|Highly recommend, great facilities, lovely residents/guests . Will definitely be making the trip again soon!
Such a nice caravan park and pretty close to the beach. Spent the weekend there for a small getaway. Kingscliff is a beautiful area the perfect spot to camp and to look around in the area.
Great location near Kingscliff. Calm & quiet park. Nice pool

As avid travelers on the road for nearly 3 years, my partner and I have experienced countless holiday parks. But let me tell you, Ingenia Holiday Parks Kingscliff, NSW, is in a league of its own. The staff's remarkable level of accommodation went beyond our expectations – they made us feel truly valued. The amenities were not just super clean, they were immaculate, and the park itself was beautifully presented. Without a doubt, this is a solid 5-star gem that sets a new standard for excellence. Don't miss out on experiencing this exceptional getaway.

Lovely park and facilities. Access for long vans and big trucks not good, due to permanents' extended gardens.

But, the noise factor detracts. Major roads on two sides which have noise all night and under flight path.  Definitely not quiet get away.

Had a lovely stay at Ingenia, Kingscliff. Cabin and grounds are kept beautifully clean, and staff members were extremely accommodating and responsive to our particular needs.
Locals also friendly and welcoming. Highly recommend 👌
Great staff,  made the stay great.
Comfortable 1 bedroom, dog friendly cabin in pleasant surroundings
Room clean an comfortable. Fabulously comfortable bed.
The staff have been absolutely fantastic in assisting with the accommodation for my 60th birthday in September.

Absolutely disgusting the park is filthy the lawns are overgrown untidy not edged rubbish around van site’s permanents overtaken it parties loud cars screaming kids way too far to get to shops and no hot water anywhere the most depressing place I’ve ever been we asked for refund and left after 3 days she took out another full charge !! Instead then 4 days later we got the refunded amounts after ringing and complaining again . Don’t stay there
Great place to stay for a holiday
